gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/96)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/96)
text: سَأَلَهُ بَعْضُ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ رَجُلٍ اشْتَرَى أَبَاهُ مِنَ الزَّكَاةِ زَكَاةِ مَالِهِ قَالَ اشْتَرَى خَيْرَ رَقَبَةٍ لَا بَأْسَ بِذَلِكَ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Mahboub, from Abu Muhammad Al Wabishy,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws, said, ‘One of our companions asked himasws about a man who buys his own father (who was a slave), from the Zakāt, the Zakāt of his wealth’. Heasws said: ‘he has bought the best of slave. There is no problem with it’.
en.sarwar: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Hassan ibn Mahbub from abu Muhammad al-Wabishiy who has said the following: “Certain persons of our people asked abu ’Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a man who has purchased with money from Zakat of his assets his own father. He (the Imam) said, ‘He has purchased the best slave and it is not harmful.’”
